description:
The language-detection package (used in org-yank-dwim for code block
detection) hasn't been updated in years. Consider whether tree-sitter-based
detection would be more accurate, though this would require a custom solution.

Low priority since the current solution works.

Affected file: `overlays/pkg/local/emacs-config/emacs.org` (lines ~458-460, ~520-523)
title: Evaluate language-detection package replacement
